data.title: Disney Cuts Content Budget By $1 Billion As It Pushes For Efficiency: House Of Mouse Says Too Early To Revise Guidance Despite Earnings Beat
data.description: Disney has reduced its content budget to $23 billion as part of ongoing cost-cutting efforts, but CFO Hugh Johnston reassured investors that the company remains confident in its earnings outlook and expects continued strong financial performance in 2025.

data.title: Novo Nordisk Opposes 'Government Price Setting' As Elon Musk's DOGE Gains Access To CMS Amid Bernie Sanders' Criticism
data.description: Novo Nordisk said that its weight-loss drug Wegovy has reached 1.2 million U.S. patients, with 55 million individuals covered by insurance.

data.title: BYD Overtakes Tesla In UK After Elon Musk-Led EV Maker's New Vehicle Registrations Drop In January
data.description: BYD Co. overtook its American counterpart Tesla in new vehicle registrations in January in the UK, according to recent industry data.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Says He Turned Down A Shot At The Presidency As It Means 'Waving Goodbye To My Family,' But The JPMorgan Chief Won't Rule Out A Future Run
data.description: Jamie Dimon, the Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE: JPM), has recently shared insights into why he chose not to pursue a bid for the U.S. presidency. His decision was influenced by family considerations and an absence of political experience.
